name: part_001
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs the song "Bitter Choco Decoration" on a casino-themed stage.
Aki Rosenthal interacts with a giant dice on stage, rolling a five and discovering a chair icon on the floor.
Aki Rosenthal performs the song "Deal with the devil" in a new costume with backup dancers.

subtitles.original: やっぱいいや
subtitles.english: Actually, never mind.

subtitles.original: もっと日常を抑えられるように
subtitles.english: So I can suppress my daily life more

subtitles.original: 鼻垂れるように
subtitles.english: As if my nose is running

subtitles.original: 分かれるように
subtitles.english: As if separating

subtitles.original: ガム噛んだ口を閉ざさぬように
subtitles.english: So as not to close my mouth while chewing gum

subtitles.original: 笑わすように
subtitles.english: To make others laugh

subtitles.original: 笑われるように
subtitles.english: To be laughed at

subtitles.original: 人ちゃんと敬うように
subtitles.english: To respect people properly

subtitles.original: 崇めるように
subtitles.english: To revere them

subtitles.original: 讃えるように
subtitles.english: To praise them

subtitles.original: 有象無象にならないように
subtitles.english: So as not to become part of the masses

subtitles.original: ふざけないように
subtitles.english: So as not to mess around

subtitles.original: 集団さんから終止形まで
subtitles.english: From the 'Shuudan' group to the final form

subtitles.original: へいこれへいこれ言っちゃって
subtitles.english: Saying "Hey, this, hey, this"

subtitles.original: あれ前髪超絶最強じゃん
subtitles.english: Look, my bangs are absolutely the best, right?

subtitles.original: とかどうでもいいのに言っちゃって
subtitles.english: Saying things that don't even matter

subtitles.original: 毎晩毎晩もう限界
subtitles.english: Every night, every night, I'm at my limit

subtitles.original: 宗教的社会の終端です
subtitles.english: It's the end of a religious society

subtitles.original: 決して発狂しないように
subtitles.english: So as never to go insane

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 時に孤独な愛は君を汚す
subtitles.english: Sometimes, lonely love stains you

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 兎角の後にひと言の愛
subtitles.english: After all is said and done, one word of love

subtitles.original: 始めはあなた言ったそうな
subtitles.english: At first, you seemed to have said it

subtitles.original: 大言壮語の並べた語
subtitles.english: Words arranged in grandiloquence

subtitles.original: いえいえいやいや好きな文字
subtitles.english: No, no, no, no, favorite words

subtitles.original: いやはやしかし今日が初めてで
subtitles.english: My, my, but this is the first time today

subtitles.original: こんなトコまで君センスあるよ
subtitles.english: You've got style, even in a place like this

subtitles.original: 恋すべき季節にビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration in the season for love

subtitles.original: 恋すべき気持ちでビターチョコデコレーション

subtitles.original: F.U.C.K.Y.O.U

subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 皆が望む理想に憧れて

subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 個性や情を全部焼き払い
subtitles.english: Burning away all individuality and emotion

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 欲やエゴは殺して土に埋め
subtitles.english: Killing greed and ego and burying them in the dirt

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
subtitles.english: Bitter Choco Decoration

subtitles.original: 僕は大人にやっと成ったよママ
subtitles.english: I've finally become an adult, Mama

subtitles.original: 明日もきっとこの先も
subtitles.english: Surely tomorrow, and from now on too

subtitles.original: 地獄は続くどこまでも
subtitles.english: Hell will continue, forever and ever

subtitles.original: あだおろそか今だけも
subtitles.english: Even just for now, don't take it lightly

subtitles.original: 本当の心の気持ちのままで
subtitles.english: While staying true to your real feelings

subtitles.original: 必死まじになってやってこうぜ
subtitles.english: Let's give it our absolute all

subtitles.original: ああ思い出した朝あの時の生真面目さ
subtitles.english: Ah, I remembered that morning, the seriousness of that time

subtitles.original: やっぱいいや
subtitles.english: Actually, never mind.

subtitles.original: サイコロ...
subtitles.english: Dice...

subtitles.original: 5が出た
subtitles.english: A five came out

subtitles.original: ん？何これ？
subtitles.english: Huh? What's this?

subtitles.original: 椅子？
subtitles.english: Chair?

subtitles.original: One, two, one, two...
subtitles.english: One, two, one, two...

subtitles.original: Deal with the devil
subtitles.english: Deal with the devil

subtitles.original: ああ札束は世の常
subtitles.english: Ah, wads of cash are the way of the world

subtitles.original: 狂うた者こそ勝者
subtitles.english: Those who go mad are the winners

subtitles.original: 肝心なのは其の眼
subtitles.english: What's important is those eyes

subtitles.original: 出し抜いてサバイヴ
subtitles.english: Outwit and survive

subtitles.original: 行き着く先にはヘル・オア・ヘヴン
subtitles.english: At the end of the line, it's Hell or Heaven

subtitles.original: この世界（ルール）は
subtitles.english: This world (rule) is

subtitles.original: たったひとり勝者こそ正義
subtitles.english: Only the sole winner is justice

subtitles.original: 女は度胸を散らして見せるのあいつは
subtitles.english: She shows off her courage, that girl

subtitles.original: やれることなんだってやるあたしは
subtitles.english: I'll do whatever it takes, for I am

subtitles.original: 賭け狂いのクィーン
subtitles.english: The Kakegurui Queen

subtitles.original: お見通しよ強情
subtitles.english: I've seen through your stubbornness

subtitles.original: 弱気手出しは無用だわ
subtitles.english: No need for half-hearted interference

subtitles.original: 欲しがりねお上手
subtitles.english: How greedy, and how clever

subtitles.original: ダイヤモンド負けない輝かせてろよ様に
subtitles.english: A diamond that won't lose, keep it shining as it should

subtitles.original: あなた内緒だわ
subtitles.english: It's a secret between us
